title: Built the first serious LLM product
body: Led QuintoAndar's first serious LLM product in search, combining natural language, visual retrieval, qualification rules, and trust-sensitive UX.

title: Search that moved contracts
body: Led discovery and search work that improved signed contracts across rental and for-sale marketplaces.

title: 9x marketplace growth
body: Helped drive 9x growth in for-sale signed contracts through operating-model redesign across qualification, agents, and funnel structure.

title: Fintech and transaction systems
body: Built financial add-ons and lending flows with meaningful adoption, better unit economics, and strong operational outcomes.
